report.summary: Audited today's new Wallet Security and Restaking Comparison pages for UX issues; fixed dark-theme table styling for restaking comparison, created OG image for restaking page, added prose-crypto table styles globally, upgraded TOC and related-article interactions with hover/focus states, added accessibility attributes to tables and navigation, and enhanced the dynamic learn route with OG metadata support.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed restaking comparison table — removed light-themed inline styles (#f5f5f5 bg) that clashed with dark site; now uses prose-crypto dark-theme table styles
Added global .prose-crypto table styles to globals.css — dark borders (#30363d), transparent backgrounds, hover row highlighting, and proper text colors for all data-driven learn pages
Added table-scroll-wrapper with role='region', aria-label, and tabIndex for keyboard-accessible horizontal scrolling on comparison tables
Added scope='col' to all table header cells for screen reader column association (both wallet security and restaking pages)
Upgraded wallet security TOC links from static inline styles to CSS class (ws-toc-link) with hover color shift (#818cf8) and indent animation (padding-left transition)
Added focus-visible outlines (2px solid indigo) to TOC links for keyboard navigation accessibility
Upgraded Related Security Resources section from plain text links to semantic nav element with card-style links showing category badge + hover border highlight + lift animation
Enhanced dynamic learn [slug] route to auto-generate openGraph and Twitter card metadata from page data, falling back to /og-{slug}.svg convention

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: restaking-comparison-eigenlayer-symbiotic-karak-2026 (1200x630) — market share bar chart visualization showing EigenLayer ($15.3B, 93.9%), Symbiotic ($897M, 5.5%), Karak ($102M, 0.6%), indigo/cyan/amber protocol-coded bars, $16.3B total market stat card, degen0x branding

sections.title: Code Changes
items: globals.css: Added 40+ lines of .prose-crypto table styles (thead, th, td, tr:hover, strong, .table-scroll-wrapper with focus styles)
learn-20260327.ts: Replaced restaking comparison table — removed border='1', background-color: #f5f5f5, inline styles; added table-scroll-wrapper div, scope='col', role='region', aria-label, tabIndex

crypto-wallet-security-guide-2026/page.tsx: Added <style> block with ws-toc-link, ws-table-wrap, ws-related-card classes; converted TOC links to use CSS class; upgraded security tools table wrapper with role/aria/tabIndex; upgraded related articles to nav element with card styling
learn/[slug]/page.tsx: Enhanced generateMetadata to include openGraph and twitter metadata with auto-derived OG image paths
